# freeipa_privilege (Data Source)

Reads details of a FreeIPA Privilege.

## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the privilege (cn).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique name of the privilege.
- `description` (String) Description of the privilege.
- `permissions` (Set of String) Set of permission names associated with this privilege.
